## Mandate reconciliation (approved 2026-05-31 v3 Balanced staged deploy)

The $1M tradfi book ≈ IBKR (~$548k, single names, deployed) + Fidelity ($445k, reserve+DCA). The Fidelity side IS the "SGOV reserve + DCA-in-waiting" half of the approved plan. Gaps vs plan:
1. **DCA pace**: current recurring $1,750/wk (~$7.6k/mo) vs approved ~$18.7k/mo on the $1M plan — under-deploying.
2. **DCA composition**: 100% equities (RSP/VXUS/GOOG/ROBO). v3 sleeves GLD/DBMF/TLT/SCHP/BTAL/AVUV/USMV = 0%. The "all-weather" part of Bubble-Aware All-Weather is missing entirely.
3. **Dip reserve**: not formalized — plan wants a permanent reserve deployed only on −7/−12/−20% S&P tiers.
4. **Tax location**: SGOV ($13.8k) sits in the Trad IRA earning bill yield inside tax-advantaged space, while GLD (28% collectibles rate if taxable) is absent — swap roles.

## v3 ticket run this session (--capital 345500): Foundation $172.7k / 9 sleeves + SGOV $172.7k (dip reserve $76k + DCA-wait $96.7k), then $6,449/mo × 15.

## Proposed structure (respecting late-cycle regime: stage, don't lump)

- Map Foundation buys to T-bill maturities over 12 weeks (Jul 7 → Sep 24) instead of a single day. Late-cycle tape (Burry AI shorts, Warsh opacity, jobs binary) argues for the glide, and it costs nothing — the ladder already staged it.
- Keep $76k (scaled) permanent dip reserve in SGOV/bills, tiers −7/−12/−20%.
- Raise weekly recurring from $1,750 to ~$2,400 and add the missing sleeves (GLD, DBMF/managed-futures, TLT, AVUV) as recurring buys where Fidelity supports ETF recurring; else monthly manual per ticket.
- Trad IRA: sell SGOV $13.8k → buy GLD there (tax location); deploy $2,975 cash → VXUS/SCHD.
- Cash Mgmt $11.5k: keep as emergency float (not investment capital).
- Roth $32, HSA $10: nothing to do.

## OPEN CONFIRMATION (P0): the T-bill ladder = risk capital per the 2026-05-31 approved deploy, NOT part of the $1.5M house reserve. Maturity clustering Jul–Sep 2026 could equally be house-purchase escrow. Confirm before executing Foundation tranches.
